mapper.update:
update jsh_customer_follow_up set delete_flag = '1' where 1=1 and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select cfu.*, s.supplier as customer_name, u.username as user_name from jsh_customer_follow_up cfu left join jsh_supplier s on cfu.customer_id = s.id and s.delete_flag = '0' left join jsh_user u on cfu.handler_id = u.id and u.Status = '0' where cfu.customer_id = #{customerId} and ifnull(cfu.delete_flag, '0') != '1' and cfu.is_handler_record = '1' and cfu.next_follow_up_time is null order by cfu.follow_up_time desc limit 1
